entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: Predominant crop in the target region of India used in a sequential system.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Crop that can follow soybean in the postrainy season in a sequential system.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Target country for the study of soybean-chickpea sequential systems.

entities.name: THAILAND
entities.description: Target country for the project on sustainable rainfed agriculture.

entities.name: VIETNAM
entities.description: Target country for the project on sustainable rainfed agriculture.

entities.name: CROPGRO MODELS
entities.description: Simulation models used to examine potential yields, yield gap, and water balance of crops.

entities.name: POTENTIAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The maximum possible yield of the crop system under optimal conditions.

entities.name: YIELD GAP
entities.description: The difference between potential productivity and current productivity.

entities.name: WATER BALANCE
entities.description: The analysis of water input and output, including evapotranspiration and runoff, in the crop system.

entities.name: SOYBEAN-CHICKPEA SEQUENTIAL SYSTEM
entities.description: A cropping system where soybean is followed by chickpea in the postrainy season.

entities.name: RAINFED SITUATION
entities.description: Agricultural conditions relying solely on rainfall without irrigation.

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTAL IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of additional water to crops to supplement rainfall to increase yields.

entities.name: WATER HARVESTING
entities.description: The process of collecting and storing rainwater for supplemental irrigation or groundwater recharge.

entities.name: EVAPOTRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The combined process of water evaporation from the soil and transpiration from plants.

entities.name: SURFACE RUNOFF
entities.description: Water from precipitation that flows over the land surface instead of infiltrating.

entities.name: WATER-HOLDING CAPACITY SOILS
entities.description: Soils characterized by medium and high ability to retain water.

entities.name: INTERMEDIATE RAINFALL ECOREGION
entities.description: An ecoregion characterized by intermediate levels of rainfall.
